summary: The response time on chat should never be more than 10 seconds.
description:
As a user, I expect every chat response to be delivered within 10 seconds so that the experience remains responsive and usable.
Acceptance Criteria
Given I send a message, the first token of the AI response must appear within 10 seconds under normal network conditions (< 100 ms RTT).

A visible loading indicator is shown while a response is being generated.

If the 10-second threshold is exceeded, the user sees a clear timeout message with a retry option.

P95 end-to-end response latency is ≤ 10 seconds as measured in production monitoring.

The SLA applies to all chat entry points (web, mobile, embedded widget).

linked_issues.summary: Verify timeout message and retry option when response exceeds 10 seconds
Verify loading indicator visibility during response generation
